(404/MAS) DARRICK CHASE WITH PET. SONJA SANDEMAN WITH RESP. ALEX BANTOV, COURT CERTIFIED INTERPRETER FOR PET. PARTIES AGREE THAT, PENDING TRIAL, S/S=$4,500/MN. AFTER AR
GUMENT AND SUBMISSION, COURT ORDERS MATTER SHALL BE SET ON 10/11/00 @ 9:30AM TO DEAL WITH ISSUES OF ALTERNATE VALUATION, TRIAL PRESENTATION AS TO
T SHALL MAKE RULING FROM BENCH AT THAT HEARING AND SHALL NOT TAKE SAID ISSUES UNDER SUBMISSION. COURT ORDERS MATTER SET FOR TRIAL ON 12/4/00 FROM
OSTS=$40,000. OF COSTS, $25,000 SHALL BE KEPT AS RETAINER FOR MR. SHEEHY'S PREPARATION OF ACCOUNTING TO TRIAL AND REMAINING $15,000 SHALL BE FOR
ON. RESP SWORN AND VOIR DIRED BY COUNSEL AS TO JURISDICTIONAL FACTS WHICH ARE PLACED ON THE RECORD. COURT ENTERS STATUS ONLY JUDGMENT EFFECTIVE AS OF
COLLATERAL ISSUES. COURT RETAINS JURISDICTION OVER PENSION AND RETIREMENT PLANS AND RETIREMENT PLAN SHALL BE JOINED. RESP TO PREPARE STATUS ONLY
